request: Gitignore setup capability, three coupled parts: (1) a NEW `gitignore` skill that generates a .gitignore via the gitignore.io service (with a vendored-default fallback for offline, per Article VI.5 offline-first); (2) `/init-project` SHALL always create a .gitignore covering baseline-specific paths (.claude/state/, _pending.md content, obj/, swarm worktrees, etc.) plus common ignores (node_modules, .env*, OS/editor cruft); (3) a NEW PreToolUse hook that hard-blocks `git commit` when required must-ignore paths are not actually ignored — validated cheaply/offline via `git check-ignore` against a fixed list, NOT a per-commit gitignore.io fetch. USER DECISIONS (triage): track intake-full + codesign_mode on; validation mechanism = new PreToolUse hard-block hook (not a commit-skill step). Governance cascades to handle in spec: new skill 41->42 AND new hook 23->24 (derive-counts, manifest, seed.md §4.1/§4.3, CLAUDE.md/README counts, CONSTITUTION Appendix A/B, settings.json wiring; see landmines baseline-skill-count-cascade + baseline-skill-edit-needs-manifest-rebuild).
